name: Malwin Ventures, Inc.
summary: Malwin Ventures, Inc. operates in the entertainment, publishing, and interactive industries. It also funds, develops, produces, publishes, and distributes digital content. The company was formerly known as Logo Industries Corp and changed its name to Malwin Ventures, Inc. in November 2008. Malwin Ventures, Inc. was incorporated in 2002 and is based in Las Vegas, Nevada.
